name: Express Jewelry and Gifts
description_short: Express Jewelry and Gifts is a pawn shop located in Farmington Hills, MI, offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/gift purchasing services.
description_long: Express Jewelry and Gifts operates as a pawn shop in Farmington Hills, Michigan, serving the local community from their Eight Mile West location. Based on the available information, the business functions within the traditional pawn shop model, accepting items of value as collateral for short-term loans. The company maintains regular business hours throughout the week, indicating a stable local operation designed to serve walk-in customers seeking quick access to cash or interested in selling jewelry and gifts. Their focus on jewelry and gifts suggests they specialize in these higher-value merchandise categories commonly accepted in pawn transactions. The business is contactable by phone and maintains a physical storefront, providing customers with direct access to their services. As a pawn shop, Express Jewelry and Gifts operates differently from credit-based lending services, as transactions are secured by physical collateral rather than credit assessment. The company's longevity and consistent hours suggest an established presence in the Farmington Hills market. Customers should note that pawn transactions typically involve immediate cash disbursement but require surrender of personal items as security for the loan period.
address: 27434 Eight Mile W, Farmington Hills, MI 48336

company_info.headquarters: 27434 Eight Mile W, Farmington Hills, MI 48336

pros: Located in easily accessible Farmington Hills location on Eight Mile West
Maintains consistent business hours Monday-Friday (10 AM-5 PM) with Saturday hours
Direct phone contact available for customer inquiries
Operates as established local business serving the community
Physical storefront allows customers to inspect items and conduct transactions in person
Specializes in jewelry and gifts, suggesting expertise in high-value item assessment
cons: Limited information available on website regarding loan terms, interest rates, or fee structure
No online transaction capability indicated; requires in-person visit
Pawn transactions require surrender of personal property as collateral
Saturday hours are reduced (3 PM closing) compared to weekday hours
Website is a Waze directions page with minimal business details
best_for: Customers seeking immediate cash in exchange for jewelry or gift items
People needing short-term collateral-based loans without credit checks
Individuals looking to sell jewelry and gifts locally
diagnosis: Express Jewelry and Gifts is best for customers in the Farmington Hills area who need immediate cash and are willing to use jewelry or gift items as collateral. The main caveat is that this is a pawn transaction model requiring surrender of personal property, and limited transparency online about specific loan terms, rates, and redemption periods means customers should call ahead or visit in person to understand the full terms before transacting.
services: Pawn loans secured by gifts and merchandise
